title: Asia Centric: China’s Shoppers Still Buy Luxury, But Selectively
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：中国消费者仍然购买奢侈品，但有选择性
summary: Chinese consumer sentiment isn’t collapsing across the board, but retail sales growth is projected to hit a four-year low. While big-ticket categories like home appliances and autos crumble under subsidy fatigue, highly resilient segments are holding ground, particularly cosmetics, luxury, and premium sportswear. In e-commerce, Alibaba and rival giants are locked in a margin-crushing battle over agentic AI to capture shrinking wallets.

title: BHP Iron Ore Workers Stage First Port Hedland Strike Since 2000

summary: BHP Group Ltd.’s iron ore production fell in the three months through June as the miner pushes ahead with expansions in copper and potash.

title: Iran War Drives New Investment in US LNG, S&P Global Says

title: Pool Stocks Sink as Consumers Cautious Despite Scorching Summer

summary: SpaceX shares slumped to their lowest level since the rocket, satellite, and artificial intelligence company went public, briefly falling below their initial public offering price, as investor fanfare quickly evaporated in the month since its trading debut.

title: US Bonds Extend Rally as Soft Inflation Data Dims Fed Hike Bets

summary: Treasuries rose for a second day after soft back-to-back US inflation readings reinforced optimism that US inflation has peaked and may curb the need for the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

title: Nvidia Expands Toyota AI Partnership for Smart Cities, Factories

title: Data Center Firm Csquare Is Said to Price IPO at $21 Per Share
title_cn: 数据中心公司 Csquare 据称将以每股 21 美元的价格进行 IPO
summary: Csquare Inc. priced its initial public offering at $21 per share, according to people familiar with the matter, below a marketed range.

title: China Sends Robots Out Into the World to Learn How to Be Human
title_cn: 中国派遣机器人到世界各地学习如何做人
summary: In an industrial park on the outskirts of Beijing, a humanoid arm picks up a bag of Lay’s potato chips and places it neatly along a row of snacks on a shelf. Nearby, a worker films himself grabbing cushions off a sofa and folding sheets on a bed, recording videos that will be used to develop brains for robots.

title: Nvidia’s Huang Says Vera Rubin on Track Despite Delay Talk

title_cn: Apple 将 AppleCare+ 每月价格最新上涨 50 美分

title: CIA Says AI Drones Give Russian Troops Only 30 Minutes to Live

title: Older UK Teens Face Midnight Curfews on Social Media Apps
title_cn: 英国老年青少年在社交媒体应用程序上面临午夜宵禁
summary: Older British teenagers face a midnight curfew for accessing some social media apps and restrictions on addictive features, as the UK government increases the scope of its proposed ban on the services for younger kids.

summary: Apple Inc. on Wednesday received long-awaited government approval to roll out Apple Intelligence in China, potentially giving it a boost in the world’s most competitive smartphone market.

summary: The bureau has taken over websites belonging to Alarum Technologies Ltd.

summary: Hinge is introducing a new feature called Friend’s Take that lets daters recruit people they know to leave testimonials on their profiles for other singles to see.

title: New York Times Fights Reporters’ Subpoenas in Air Force One Case

summary: The New York Times refused to let its reporters testify in front of a federal grand jury after they were subpoenaed by the Trump administration over a story about security issues with an Air Force One plane donated by Qatar.

summary: The US launched more airstrikes on Iran Wednesday, after President Donald Trump pledged to intensify the bombardment until Tehran stops attacking ships in the Strait of Hormuz and agrees to open the waterway.

title: Ken Griffin Gives Millions to Back GOP in Tight Senate Races
title_cn: 肯·格里芬捐赠数百万美元支持共和党在激烈的参议院竞选中
summary: Ken Griffin, one of the biggest Republican political donors, gave $10 million to the party’s main Senate super political action committee and poured in millions more to bolster candidates in races the GOP must win to hold its majority, the latest Federal Election Commission filings show.

title: Ukraine Tech-Savvy Defense Minister Fedorov Leaves in Reshuffle
title_cn: 乌克兰精通技术的国防部长费多罗夫因改组而离职
summary: Ukrainian Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov said he’s leaving the government after six months in the job following alleged tensions with the country’s military.

title: Israel Aid Vote Splits House Democrats in Sign of Growing Rift

summary: More than 100 Democrats, including former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, backed a House measure to block all military aid to Israel in a sign of a growing rift in the Democratic Party over how to deal with the US ally.

title: Ex-Fed Adviser Gets Three Years in Prison in China Secrets Case
title_cn: 前美联储顾问因中国机密案被判入狱三年
summary: A former senior adviser for the Federal Reserve Board of Governors was sentenced to more than three years in prison for lying to federal investigators looking into whether he shared confidential data with Chinese intelligence operatives, the Justice Department said.

title: Zelenskyy Picks Energy CEO for Premier as Kyiv Steels for Winter
title_cn: 泽连斯基任命能源首席执行官为基辅冬季钢铁公司总理
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy named the head of a state-run energy company as Ukraine’s next prime minister, underscoring his focus on preparing for the coming winter under the threat of Russian attacks.

title: Clayton Sidesteps When Asked Whether Biden Won 2020 Election
title_cn: 当被问及拜登是否赢得 2020 年大选时，克莱顿回避
summary: The White House nominee to oversee the US intelligence community repeatedly declined to say if Joe Biden won the 2020 election, drawing criticism from Democrats who argued that his refusal to answer showed he wouldn’t be willing to contradict President Donald Trump.

title: Trump Urges Faster Submarine Production, Singles Out General Dynamics at Summit
title_cn: 特朗普敦促加快潜艇生产速度，并在峰会上特别提到通用动力公司
summary: President Donald Trump urged military contractors to speed up production, singling out General Dynamics Corp. during a summit aimed at strengthening the nation’s defense industrial base.

title: Blanche Agrees to Help Kill Weaponization Fund in Nomination Bid
title_cn: 布兰奇同意在提名竞标中帮助消灭武器化基金
summary: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche told senators he would support legislation to foreclose the creation of a $1.8 billion government weaponization fund in an apparent concession to win the support of skeptical lawmakers considering his nomination to be the nation’s top law enforcement officer.

title: Vance Urges Divided GOP to Pass Politically Risky Iran War Funds
title_cn: 万斯敦促分裂的共和党通过具有政治风险的伊朗战争基金

title: Trump’s Speech Could Set the Tone for Midterm Election Denial

summary: President Donald Trump criticized New York Governor Kathy Hochul for announcing a temporary ban on data centers, calling it a “terrible decision” and urging the state to change its decision immediately.

title: US Labels Two More Mexican Gangs as Terrorists in Latest Anti-Crime Push
title_cn: 美国在最新的反犯罪行动中将另外两个墨西哥团伙列为恐怖分子
summary: The US government listed two Mexican criminal gangs that have long been part of the country’s drug trafficking rings as terrorist groups, a move that could lay the groundwork for Donald Trump to order future legal or even military action against them.

title: Elon Musk Gives Ramaswamy PAC $5 Million For Ohio Governor Race

summary: The UK’s prime minister-to-be said he planned to be “upfront” with his US counterpart and rely on his own personality to keep relations on an even keel.

title: Pentagon to Screen Testosterone of Male Troops, Hegseth Says

summary: The Pentagon will begin screening male troops for testosterone deficiency, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced on Wednesday.

title: Albanian Push to Host NATO Summit Next Year Backfires
title_cn: 阿尔巴尼亚推动明年主办北约峰会适得其反
summary: Edi Rama’s larger-than-life style failed to nail down Albania’s bid to run a NATO summit next year when the alliance’s leaders met in Ankara.

title: Burnham Upsets Labour Left Who Wanted Him to Become UK Premier
title_cn: 伯纳姆惹恼了希望他成为英国首相的工党左派
summary: As reports swirl that Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood will be Andy Burnham’s pick for chancellor, the direction of his incoming UK government is causing consternation on the left of the Labour Party before he’s even become prime minister.

title: Trump Officials Move Toward Renewing Shipping Waiver for Fuel
title_cn: 特朗普官员迈向更新燃料运输豁免
summary: Trump administration officials are advancing plans to extend a shipping waiver that’s made it easier to move oil, fuel and fertilizer around the US, as the renewed war in Iran raises the prospect of prolonged supply disruptions.
